{
    "cli": "quizcomp.cli.parse.quiz",
    "arguments": [
        "__DATA_DIR__(../../../testdata/quizzes/good/all-basic-questions/quiz.json)",
        "--format", "tex"
    ],
}
---
\documentclass{report}
\usepackage[T1]{fontenc}
\usepackage[a4paper,left=2cm,right=2cm,top=2cm,bottom=2cm]{geometry}

\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{epsfig}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{multicol}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{upquote}
\usepackage{xparse}
\usepackage{zref-abspage}
\usepackage{zref-savepos}
\usepackage{zref-user}

% PDF metadata.
\usepackage[
    pdftex,
    hidelinks,
        pdftitle={All Basic Questions},
    pdfcreator={Quiz Composer},
]{hyperref}

% Remove paragraph indentation.
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

\DeclareMathOperator*{\argmax}{arg\,max}
\DeclareMathOperator*{\argmin}{arg\,min}

\usetikzlibrary{calc}

% Make a checkbox for multiple choice questions and record the bounding boxes to the positions file.
% Args: {text}[type identifier][question id][part id][answer id]
\newcommand{\radio}[5][none]{%
    \begin{tikzpicture}[color=black, line width=0.4mm]
        \fill[transparent] (0mm,0mm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ll}}
            rectangle (6mm,6mm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ur}};
        \draw [fill=#1] (3mm,3mm)
            circle (2.5mm);
    \end{tikzpicture} %
    \write\positionOutput{%
        #3,#4,#5,%
        #2,%
        \arabic{abspage},%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,%
        \the\paperwidth,\the\paperheight,%
        bottom-left%
    } \relax %
}

% Make a checkbox and record the bounding boxes to the positions file.
% Args: {fill color}[type identifier][question id][part id][answer id]
\newcommand{\checkbox}[5][none]{%
    \begin{tikzpicture}[color=black, line width=0.4mm]
        \fill[transparent] (0mm,0mm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ll}}
            rectangle (6mm,6mm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ur}};
        \draw [fill=#1] (0.5mm,0.5mm)
            rectangle (5.5mm,5.5mm);
    \end{tikzpicture} %
    \write\positionOutput{%
        #3,#4,#5,%
        #2,%
        \arabic{abspage},%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,%
        \the\paperwidth,\the\paperheight,%
        bottom-left%
    } \relax %
}

% Make a general large answer box and record the bounding boxes to the positions file.
% Args: {text}[height][length modifier (modifies \textwidth)][type identifier][question id][part id][answer id]
\NewDocumentCommand{\bigAnswerBox} { O{} m m m m m m }{%
    \begin{tikzpicture}[color=black, line width=0.4mm]
        \fill[transparent] (0mm, 0mm)
            node {\zsavepos{#5-#6-#7-ll}}
            rectangle (#3 \textwidth, #2)
            node {\zsavepos{#5-#6-#7-ur}};
        \draw (0.5mm,0.5mm)
            rectangle (#3 \textwidth - 0.5mm, #2 - 0.5mm)
            node[midway, red] {#1};
    \end{tikzpicture} %
    \write\positionOutput{%
        #5,#6,#7,%
        #4,%
        \arabic{abspage},%
        \zposx{#5-#6-#7-ll}sp,\zposy{#5-#6-#7-ll}sp,%
        \zposx{#5-#6-#7-ur}sp,\zposy{#5-#6-#7-ur}sp,%
        \the\paperwidth,\the\paperheight,%
        bottom-left%
    } \relax %
}

% Make a general answer box and record the bounding boxes to the positions file.
% Args: {text}[type identifier][question id][part id][answer id]
\NewDocumentCommand{\smallAnswerBox} { O{} m m m m }{%
    \begin{tikzpicture}[color=black, line width=0.4mm]
        \fill[transparent] (0cm, 0cm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ll}}
            rectangle (1cm, 1cm)
            node {\zsavepos{#3-#4-#5-ur}};
        \draw (0.5mm,0.5mm)
            rectangle (0.95cm, 0.95cm)
            node[midway, red] {#1};
    \end{tikzpicture} %
    \write\positionOutput{%
        #3,#4,#5,%
        #2,%
        \arabic{abspage},%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ll}sp,%
        \zposx{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,\zposy{#3-#4-#5-ur}sp,%
        \the\paperwidth,\the\paperheight,%
        bottom-left%
    } \relax %
}

\newdimen\remainingheight
\newcommand*{\calcremainingheight}{%
    \ifdim\pagegoal=\maxdimen
        \remainingheight\dimexpr\textheight-0.4pt\relax
    \else
        \remainingheight\dimexpr\pagegoal-\pagetotal-\lineskip-0.4pt\relax
    \fi
}

% Write positions to <job>.pos .
\newwrite\positionOutput
\openout\positionOutput=\jobname.pos\relax

% Code display settings.
\lstset{
    basicstyle=\ttfamily\small,
    columns=fixed,
    fontadjust=true,
    basewidth=0.5em,
    showspaces=false,
    showstringspaces=false,
    showtabs=false,
    frame=single,
    tabsize=4,
    breaklines=true,
    breakatwhitespace=false,
}

% Clear headers and footers for the first page.
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhead{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0mm}
\fancyfoot{}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0mm}

\begin{document}

    \centerline{\Large All Basic Questions}
\vspace{0.2cm}

\hrule

\vspace{0.5cm}

\begin{tabular}{ m{2.0cm} m{5cm} }
    Name: & \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{0.80}{name}{name}{0}{0} \\
\end{tabular}

\begin{tabular}{ m{2.0cm} m{5cm} }
    Student ID: & \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{0.80}{id}{email}{0}{0} \\
\end{tabular}

\hrule

\vspace{1.0cm}

\textbf{Total Points: 12.0}

Collect the basic version of each question type.

\vspace{1.0cm}

By signing below, I acknowledge that I have neither given nor received inappropriate help on this exam, and have abided by the letter and spirit of the University of California, Santa Cruz Code of Academic Integrity while taking this exam.

\vspace{0.25cm}

\begin{tabular}{ m{2.0cm} m{5cm} }
    Signature: & \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{0.80}{signature}{signature}{0}{0} \\
\end{tabular}

\vspace{0.25cm}

Fill in the box below if you believe your exam may require manual grading,
e.g., you crossed out answers or needed space outside a designated answer box. \\
\begin{tabular}{ m{10mm} l }
    \checkbox{manual_grading}{manual_grading}{0}{0} & My exam may require manual grading. \\
\end{tabular}

\newpage

% Set headers and footers.
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhead{}
\fancyhead[C]{All Basic Questions}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0.1mm}
\fancyfoot{}
\fancyfoot[R]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0.1mm}

%%% BEGIN Group {0.0 -- essay-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.0.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 1} (0.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Essay: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Place your answer within the boxed region on the next page.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

    \end{minipage}
    \newpage
    \begin{minipage}{\textwidth}

        \begin{center}

    \calcremainingheight
    \bigAnswerBox[]{\remainingheight}{1.0}{essay}{0.0.0}{0}{0}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.0.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.0 -- essay-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.1 -- fimb-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.1.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 2} (1.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Fill in Multiple Blanks: Basic -- \textsc{<A>} \textsc{<B>} \textsc{<C>} \textsc{<D>}

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    For each part (denoted by angle brackets), place your answer in the associated box.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

            A: \\
                \bigAnswerBox{4em}{0.95}{fill_in_multiple_blanks}{0.1.0}{0.1.0.0}{0} \\
            B: \\
                \bigAnswerBox{4em}{0.95}{fill_in_multiple_blanks}{0.1.0}{0.1.0.1}{0} \\
            C: \\
                \bigAnswerBox{4em}{0.95}{fill_in_multiple_blanks}{0.1.0}{0.1.0.2}{0} \\
            D: \\
                \bigAnswerBox{4em}{0.95}{fill_in_multiple_blanks}{0.1.0}{0.1.0.3}{0} \\

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.1.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.1 -- fimb-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.2 -- fitb-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.2.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 3} (1.5 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Short Answer / Fill in The Blank: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Place your answer within the boxed region below.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

    \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{1.0}{fill_in_the_blank}{0.2.0}{0}{0}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.2.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.2 -- fitb-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.3 -- ma-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.3.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 4} (2.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Multiple Answers: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Fill in all boxes that corresponds to your answers.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

        \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.06\textwidth} m{0.8\textwidth} }
                \checkbox{multiple_answers}{0.3.0}{0.3.0.0}{0}
                    & A \\
                \checkbox{multiple_answers}{0.3.0}{0.3.0.1}{0}
                    & B \\
                \checkbox{multiple_answers}{0.3.0}{0.3.0.2}{0}
                    & C \\
                \checkbox{multiple_answers}{0.3.0}{0.3.0.3}{0}
                    & D \\
        \end{tabular}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.3.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.3 -- ma-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.4 -- matching-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.4.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 5} (2.25 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Matching: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Fill in the each box on the left with a letter from the right.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

    \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.08\textwidth} m{0.17\textwidth} }

                \smallAnswerBox{matching}{0.4.0}{0.4.0.left0}{0} & A \\

                \smallAnswerBox{matching}{0.4.0}{0.4.0.left1}{0} & B \\

                \smallAnswerBox{matching}{0.4.0}{0.4.0.left2}{0} & C \\
    \end{tabular}
    \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.05\textwidth} m{0.60\textwidth} }
            A. & 1 \\[0.5cm]
            B. & 2 \\[0.5cm]
            C. & 3 \\[0.5cm]
            D. & 4 \\[0.5cm]
            E. & 5 \\[0.5cm]
            F. & 6 \\[0.5cm]
    \end{tabular}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.4.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.4 -- matching-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.5 -- mcq-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.5.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 6} (0.75 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Multiple Choice: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Fill in the circle that corresponds to your answer.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

        \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.06\textwidth} m{0.8\textwidth} }
                \radio{multiple_choice}{0.5.0}{0}{0.5.0.0}
                    & A \\
                \radio{multiple_choice}{0.5.0}{0}{0.5.0.1}
                    & B \\
                \radio{multiple_choice}{0.5.0}{0}{0.5.0.2}
                    & C \\
                \radio{multiple_choice}{0.5.0}{0}{0.5.0.3}
                    & D \\
        \end{tabular}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.5.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.5 -- mcq-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.6 -- mdd-basic} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.6.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 7} (1.5 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Multiple Drop Downs: Basic \textsc{<part1>} and \textsc{<part2>}

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    For each part (denoted by angle brackets), fill in the circle that corresponds to your choice.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \end{minipage}


        \begin{minipage}{\textwidth}

        \noindent
        part1:

            \begin{center}

            \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.06\textwidth} m{0.8\textwidth} }
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.0}{0}
                        & a \\
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.0}{1}
                        & b \\
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.0}{2}
                        & c \\
            \end{tabular}

            \end{center}
        \end{minipage}

            \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{minipage}{\textwidth}

        \noindent
        part2:

            \begin{center}

            \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.06\textwidth} m{0.8\textwidth} }
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.1}{0}
                        & 1 \\
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.1}{1}
                        & 2 \\
                    \radio{multiple_dropdowns}{0.6.0}{0.6.0.1}{2}
                        & 3 \\
            \end{tabular}

            \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.6.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.6 -- mdd-basic} %%%
\vspace{1.0cm}

%%% BEGIN Question {0.7.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 8} (1.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Place your answer within the boxed region below.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

    \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{1.0}{numerical}{0.7.0}{0}{0}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 9} (1.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    Short Answer: Basic

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Place your answer within the boxed region below.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

    \bigAnswerBox[]{4em}{1.0}{short_answer}{0.8.0}{0}{0}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 10} (0.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent

    \vspace{0.25cm}


\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.9.0 -- None} %%%

\vspace{1.0cm}
%%% BEGIN Group {0.10 -- tf-true} %%%


%%% BEGIN Question {0.10.0 -- None} %%%

\begin{minipage}{\textwidth}
    \noindent
        \textbf{Question 11} (1.0 Points)
    \vspace{0.25cm}

    \noindent
    True/False: True

    \vspace{0.25cm}

    Fill in the circle that corresponds to your choice.

        \vspace{0.25cm}

        \begin{center}

        \begin{tabular}{ >{\centering\arraybackslash}m{0.06\textwidth} m{0.8\textwidth} }
                \radio{true_false}{0.10.0}{0}{0.10.0.0}
                    & True \\
                \radio{true_false}{0.10.0}{0}{0.10.0.1}
                    & False \\
        \end{tabular}

        \end{center}
\end{minipage}

%%% END Question {0.10.0 -- None} %%%



%%% END Group {0.10 -- tf-true} %%%

\end{document}
